steps.title: Mark the category boundary
steps.content: Diadromous fish migrate between freshwater and marine biomes as part of their life cycle. Euryhaline fish can tolerate high salinity but do not necessarily relocate to a different biome. The blank should mean distinguished or separated from.

steps.title: Choose separation, not mixing
steps.content: Choice B means remade into something else. Choice C means treated as the same, the opposite of the contrast. Choice D means originating from another group, which the passage never claims. The remaining phrase means clearly set apart. The answer is A.
